title: Employee Leave Transactions
description: Information on recorded transactions for leaves taken by employees.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the employee leave transaction.

employeeLeave.title: Employee Leave
employeeLeave.description: The leave plan for which the transaction occurred.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Employee Leave.

accrued.title: Accrued
accrued.description: The number of hours accrued for leave.

taken.title: Taken
taken.description: The number of hours taken for leave.

available.title: Available
available.description: The number of hours available for leave.
